buildspec.yml.general_idea: Install and configure JDK 21 in the build environment to support the migration from Java 17.
buildspec.yml.why_exists: The build will fail at runtime or during compilation if the project requires Java 21 features but the environment only provides Java 17 or an older version.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Update SonarQube property name from 'sonar.login' to 'sonar.token' to align with newer SonarQube API requirements.
buildspec.yml.why_exists: Older SonarQube scanners or configurations may reject 'sonar.login' in favor of 'sonar.token', causing analysis failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version remains at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Payara Micro server version to a release compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Payara versions may not support running on JDK 21 due to internal API changes or module system restrictions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the MicroProfile specification version to 6.1.
pom.xml.why_exists: MicroProfile 5.0 is tied to older Jakarta EE versions; upgrading ensures compatibility with the new Jakarta EE 10 runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Payara Micro Maven plugin to version 2.0.
pom.xml.why_exists: Plugin version 1.4.0 may not support the new Payara Micro 6.2024.x bundle generation or JDK 21 build environment.
